rationale: The plan is purely additive — it creates one new file (waveField.ts) implementing the existing GeometrySystem interface and adds a single registration entry in main.ts. No existing interfaces, contracts, or modules are modified. The ModeManager, GeometrySystem interface, FrameState, VisualParams, and render loop are all untouched.
implementation_notes: All planned work has already been implemented. waveField.ts exists at src/visual/systems/waveField.ts with the exact interface, wave state structure, and visual param mappings described in the plan. main.ts already imports createWaveField and registers it as a second ModeEntry alongside ParticleField, with quality-tier-derived maxWaves (8/14/20) and enableShimmer config.

affected_modules.impact: none — implements existing GeometrySystem interface, no coupling to other systems
minimal — extends existing modes array, no structural change

plan_accuracy.interface_contract: correct — GeometrySystem requires init(ctx, seed, params) and draw(ctx, frame) exactly as described
plan_accuracy.frame_state_shape: correct — FrameState has time, delta, elapsed, params, width, height, pointerX, pointerY
plan_accuracy.mode_manager_behavior: correct — seeded initial mode selection, 90-180s switch interval, cyclic switching via modulo
plan_accuracy.audio_decoupling: correct — render loop polls analyser independently; mode switch only calls geometrySystem.init(), no audio interaction
plan_accuracy.quality_tier_mapping: correct — QualityProfile has maxParticles, enableSparkle, resolutionScale; maxWaves is derived in main.ts (not in QualityProfile), matching plan's note about deriving from existing fields

risks_assessment.performance: low — wave rendering uses simple lineTo segments (not bezier), wave count capped by quality tier, shimmer is a lightweight sin() modulation
risks_assessment.visual_discontinuity: low — ModeManager does hard switch with no transition; acceptable per acceptance criteria which only require no playback break, not smooth visual transition
risks_assessment.regression: none — no existing code is modified beyond adding a new mode entry

adr_reason: No architectural decisions introduced. The plan exercises an existing extension point (GeometrySystem + ModeManager) exactly as designed. No new patterns, contracts, or infrastructure.
